## BuiltIn.BuiltInData.getTasksDirectory() method

Gets the tasks directory from the built-in library tree.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static getTasksDirectory(): Result<FileTree.IFileTreeDirectoryItem>;
```
**Returns:**

Result&lt;FileTree.IFileTreeDirectoryItem&gt;
